rawFiles.notes: SPARQL query for Syrian governorates by ISO 3166-2 code.

rawFiles.notes: Raw Wikidata Query Service JSON result.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-governorates/wikidata-governorate-measurements-query.sparql
rawFiles.notes: SPARQL query for Wikidata area and population statements by ISO 3166-2 code.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-27-governorates/wikidata-governorate-measurements-result.json
rawFiles.notes: Raw Wikidata Query Service JSON result for area and population statements.

transforms: Queried Wikidata records by ISO 3166-2 codes for Syria governorates.
Removed duplicate rows caused by multiple coordinate statements before normalization.
Used Wikidata English labels as canonical English governorate names and Arabic labels as canonical Arabic names.
Normalized canonical names by removing English Governorate and Arabic محافظة administrative descriptors.
Imported Wikidata area statements when the unit was square kilometre.
Imported the latest plausible dated population statement per governorate and excluded malformed historical dates.
Excluded Wikidata coordinate statements from canonical centroids in favor of GeoNames ADM1 coordinates for this seed pass.
reviewNotes: Seeded Wikidata QIDs, Arabic labels, English labels, ISO 3166-2 codes, selected aliases, area measurements, and dated population measurements for all 14 Syrian governorates. Damascus area remains null because no Wikidata area statement was returned in this import.
